page_title: Plumble — Addictive Physics Merge Game | 5 Themes x Combo Chains
meta_description: Plumble is a fun-packed physics merge game. Drop cute characters, collide and evolve them, and chase your high score! 5 themes, Combo chains, and 14 languages.
og_title: Plumble — Addictive Physics Merge Game | 5 Themes x Combo Chains
og_description: A fun-packed physics merge game. Drop cute characters, collide and evolve them, and chase your high score!
twitter_description: A fun-packed physics merge game. 5 themes, Combo chains, and shake physics.
jsonld_description: Drop, collide, and merge! A fun-packed physics merge game. 5 themes, Combo chains, and 14 languages supported.
hero_tagline: Drop, Collide, Merge! The physics game you can't put down
hero_tagline_sub: Cute characters x Physics collisions x Combo chains — Can you reach the Lv.10 explosion?
features_subtitle: Easy to pick up, impossible to put down
feature_combo_desc: Chain merges to trigger NICE → GREAT → AMAZING → INCREDIBLE for up to 5x score bonus!
feature_themes_desc: Fruit, Cat, Food, Career, and Trash — each theme has unique characters to collect and evolve.
feature_physics_desc: Shake or tilt your phone to rearrange characters on the field and create new merge opportunities!
feature_explosion_desc: Merge to the max level to trigger a massive explosion — clear the field for +5000 points with stunning visuals!
feature_continue_desc: Continue even after a game over — never lose your progress! Keep pushing for that high score.
feature_languages_desc: Supports 14 languages including English, Japanese, Korean, Chinese, and more — play worldwide!
themes_subtitle: Each theme has 10 unique characters, evolving from Lv.1 to Lv.10
combo_subtitle: Chain merges to multiply your score! The faster, the stronger!
final_cta_subtitle: Follow now and be the first to know when it launches
